Bog fishing (Spear)

Bog fishing (Spear)
Main Skill: Fishing
Max Efficiency: 200%

While under the waters of the bog, you ready your fishing spear, primed to strike any fish that comes close enough. The murky water makes it difficult to see, but you are determined to catch something.

The Bog fishing (Spear) activity is a Fishing activity.

Location

This activity can be done at the following location:

  • Bog Bottom in Grand Duchy of Trellin-Erdwise

Visibility

This activity is always visible.

Requirements

Skill Level Requirements:

  • At least Fishing lvl. 50.

Keyword Requirements:

  • Have Fishing spear equipped.
  • Requires [2] unique Light source equipped.
  • Requires [3] unique Advanced diving gear equipped.

Experience Information

Skill Base
XP 		Base
Steps 		Base
XP/Step 		Total Base
XP/Step 		Minimum
Steps 		Max
XP/Step 		Total Max
XP/Step
Fishing 150 135 1.111 1.111 68 2.206 2.206

Main Drops

Item Name Quantity Chance Odds Base
Rate 		W.E.A.R. Value
Single (Stack)
Raw largemouth bass 1 22.222% ~1 in 5 608 steps 306 steps 10 (10)
Raw perch 1 22.222% ~1 in 5 608 steps 306 steps 0 (0)
Raw trout 1 22.222% ~1 in 5 608 steps 306 steps 1 (1)
Mud 1 11.111% ~1 in 9 1,215 steps 612 steps 0 (0)
Sea shell 1 11.111% ~1 in 9 1,215 steps 612 steps 5 (5)
Sweet kelp 1 11.111% ~1 in 9 1,215 steps 612 steps 6 (6)

Secondary Drops

Each of the secondary drops is rolled independently of the others.

Item Name Item Type Quantity Chance Odds Base
Rate 		W.E.A.R.
Fishing chest Container 1 0.400% ~1 in 250 33,750 steps 17,000 steps
